name: Braze
description: Monitor Braze customer engagement platform for API security and campaign access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Braze at https://dashboard.braze.com
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Create a key with campaigns.list permission
4. Find your REST endpoint URL in the same settings page
5. Enter both below

credentialFields.label: REST API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Braze → Settings → API Keys (create a key with campaigns.list and email.unsubscribes permissions)

credentialFields.label: REST Endpoint URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Braze REST endpoint URL. Found in Braze → Settings → API Keys. Example: https://rest.iad-01.braze.com

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Braze campaigns to audit active customer engagement workflows

checks.name: Secure Secrets
checks.description: Verifies Braze API keys are scoped with least-privilege permissions
